effort_complexity.rationale: Six call sites across four MCP files, same fix pattern; tools_plan.go's write-back path needs the most care.

violations: Gate 6 / AC-02: internal/mcp/context.go readProofViolations still falls back to a proof.md regex scrape after attempting proof.json.not_delivered, violating AC-02's requirement to read violations from proof.json.not_delivered and not from a proof.md regex scrape.

Gate 3 / AC-02: TestGetBlockedExtractsViolations in internal/mcp/tools_test.go exercises only the legacy proof.md fallback path and does not test the required proof.json.not_delivered integration point; no MCP test in internal/mcp exercises proof.json.not_delivered.

reachability_artifacts: internal/mcp tests: TestGetBoard, TestGetBlockedExtractsViolations, TestGetSliceContext, TestDeferSliceWritesRuleTwo, TestRerunSliceWritesPID, TestPatchSliceWritesInstructions, TestApproveMergeRejectsUnverified, TestListReleases, TestSetTrackUpdates, TestSetTrackColon (drives the same code paths an MCP client reaches over the wire)
